value: Thank you for reaching out. I appreciate you bringing this to our attention, though I want to clarify that I don't have access to specific route information or website updates from my end. To give you accurate details about any changes to our SFO-LAS service, I'd recommend checking directly with our reservations team at [contact method] or visiting our website's route map, where the most current flight schedules are posted. If you have an existing booking on this route, I'm happy to help you explore alternative options or look into what we can do for you—just let me know your confirmation number and travel dates.
